prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约 3031→3825→5776→4364→4791 名。2023 年出现明显后移（约 5776 名），2024 年有所回升至约 4364 名，2025 年再次后移至约 4791 名，近 3 年波动较大，整体呈震荡后移态势。2025 年基准位次约 4791 名；该校在黑龙江省理科（物理类）招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 62、61、60、60、60 人，基本稳定在 60 人左右；2026 年计划 61 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 1.7%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学为 985、211、双一流高校；2026 年软科中国大学主榜排名第 16 位（Top20），近年排名稳定在第 14–16 位区间，属于国内顶尖综合性大学；2026 年声誉评价为「明显负面」，事件统计总数 51 条（负面 46 条），主要涉及师德师风、学术不端等舆情；2023 年亦为「明显负面」（12 条负面事件，含地铁事件等）。抖音热度排名第 35 位（较热），短视频曝光量中等。投档异常方面，2022 年四川大学在各省投档线出现大幅下降（中关注），2023 年出现高关注异常（12 个事件）。综合来看，近年负面舆情密集，可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制；口腔医学 A+、临床医学 A、中国语言文学 A+、护理学 A+、数学 A、化学 A、生物学 A、药学 A、软件工程 A、轻工技术与工程 A、马克思主义理论 A 等，A- 及以上学科共 19 个，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力不减。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、临床医学（推荐）、口腔医学（推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）等热门专业与川大优势学科高度匹配，相关专业报考热度持续偏高。黑龙江省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，较 2025 年（约 17.2 万）略有下降；按近年比例估算，物理类考生约 11.4 万，较 2025 年（约 11.7 万）小幅减少，竞争压力略有缓解。；四川大学位于四川省成都市（西南地区），对黑龙江省考生属于跨省就读。该校在黑龙江省理科（物理类）招生人数近年稳定在 60–62 人，占全国招生总量比例较小（约 2%–3%），地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次震荡后移趋势、2026 年招生计划小幅扩招、黑龙江省物理类考生略有减少、以及近年密集负面舆情对报考热度的潜在抑制，在 2025 年基准 4791 名基础上，预计 2026 年最低录取位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约4889名，区间4389–5389名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3031, 3825, 5776, 4364, and 4791 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (about 5776), rebounding to about 4364 in 2024, and then shifting back to about 4791 in 2025. The past three years have shown large fluctuations, with an overall oscillating backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4791. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for science (physics category) from 2021 to 2025 was 62, 61, 60, 60, and 60 students respectively, remaining stable at around 60. The 2026 plan is 61 students, a slight expansion of about 1.7% compared to 2025, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 16th (Top 20), with a stable ranking in the 14th–16th range in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', with a total of 51 events (46 negative), mainly involving teacher ethics, academic misconduct, and other public opinion incidents. In 2023, it was also 'significantly negative' (12 negative events, including the subway incident). Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. Regarding enrollment anomalies, in 2022, Sichuan University experienced a significant drop in admission scores across provinces (medium attention), and in 2023, there was a high-attention anomaly (12 events). Overall, the dense negative public opinion in recent years may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology. However, with A+ in Stomatology, A in Clinical Medicine, A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, A+ in Nursing, A in Mathematics, A in Chemistry, A in Biology, A in Pharmacy, A in Software Engineering, A in Light Industry Technology and Engineering, A in Marxist Theory, and a total of 19 disciplines at A- or above, the university's academic strength is extremely strong, maintaining its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Clinical Medicine (recommended), Stomatology (recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) are highly aligned with Sichuan University's advantageous disciplines, and the application heat for related majors remains high. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is about 167,000, a slight decrease from about 172,000 in 2025. Estimated by recent proportions, physics category candidates are about 114,000, a slight decrease from about 117,000 in 2025, leading to a slight easing of competitive pressure. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province (Southwest China), which is an out-of-province study destination for Heilongjiang candidates. The number of students enrolled in science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province has been stable at 60–62 in recent years, accounting for a small proportion (about 2%–3%) of the total national enrollment, so regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the oscillating backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the slight decrease in physics category candidates in Heilongjiang Province, and the potential suppression of application heat due to dense negative public opinion in recent years, based on the 2025 baseline of 4791, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4889, with a range of 4389–5389.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (4389–5389), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 4400), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., outside 5300), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 408, 505, 2795 (abnormal in 2023), 684, and 665 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant abnormal drop (about 2795th), which quickly recovered to about 684th in 2024, and remained roughly stable at about 665th in 2025. Rankings have stabilized in the past two years, with a baseline of about 665th in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Heilongjiang Province from 2021 to 2025 was 10, 11, 10, 12, and 12 students respectively, stabilizing at 10–12 students in recent years. The 2026 plan is 12 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 16th (Top 20), with outstanding liberal arts strength, including A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, A- in Law, and A in Marxist Theory. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', but the negative incidents mainly involve engineering fields (such as the School of Mechanical Engineering), with relatively limited direct impact on liberal arts admissions. Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with moderate overall attention. Strong liberal arts disciplines such as A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, A- in Law, A in Marxist Theory, A in Chinese History, and A- in Archaeology strongly attract liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law (recommended, relatively hot), Chinese Language/Literature (recommended, relatively hot), and Teacher Training/Education (divergent, wait-and-see) align with Sichuan University's strengths. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the ordinary college entrance examination in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, with an estimated 53,000 history category candidates based on recent proportions, slightly fewer than 2025 (about 55,000), leading to a slight easing of competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, which is an out-of-province choice for Heilongjiang liberal arts candidates. The number of liberal arts (history category) admissions in Heilongjiang Province has stabilized at 10–12 students in recent years, a small proportion, making regional preference factors insignificant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that historical rankings have stabilized after the 2023 anomaly, the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, the number of history category candidates has slightly decreased, and the sustained appeal of strong liberal arts disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly improve (competition slightly eases) compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 658th, with a range of 582–734th.
